queue.task: Review weekend work, assess HenryDB test gaps, set Monday direction
queue.summary: Reviewed weekend: 120 tasks Sun, HenryDB 3068 tests/323 SQL compliance, neural-net CI green. Key issue: MVCCHeap missing export breaks transactional-db.test.js. Queue is well-structured — no reordering needed.

queue.goal: Fix remaining HenryDB test failures (5 transactional-db, HeapFile.getByRowId for index NLJ)
queue.summary: Planned 3 BUILD tasks: (1) Implement MVCCHeap + fix import, (2) Fix remaining transactional-db test failures, (3) HeapFile.getByRowId for index NLJ

queue.task: Implement MVCCHeap class in mvcc.js + fix transactional-db.js import, run transactional-db tests
queue.summary: Implemented MVCCHeap, isVisible, computeXminHorizon, frozen txId 0. Fixed commit/rollback API compat. 13/13 transactional-db + 9/9 vacuum tests passing.

queue.task: Fix remaining transactional-db test failures after MVCCHeap fix
queue.summary: Already complete — all 13 transactional-db tests pass from T3 work.

queue.task: Implement HeapFile.getByRowId for index NLJ
queue.summary: HeapFile.get(pageId, slotIdx) already implements getByRowId for both HeapFile and FileBackedHeap. Index scans use it at db.js:2587. INLJ tests pass 8/8. No changes needed.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, dashboard health, knowledge capture
queue.summary: Git pushed henrydb and workspace. Dashboard healthy. Knowledge capture: frozen txId 0 pattern added to failures.md.

queue.task: Reflect on HenryDB quality — what patterns keep breaking? What needs architectural attention?
queue.summary: Key patterns: (1) Layer interface mismatches, (2) Recovery != operational path, (3) Cache invalidation is #1 subtle bug source, (4) MVCC bugs compound (4-layer cascade), (5) JS null coercion. Architectural: need unified MVCC interface, consistent cache invalidation framework, systematic close/reopen integration tests.

queue.goal: Monkey ecosystem: submit monkeylang.org listing PR, add JIT diagnostic output for fuzzer support (Daniel collab)
queue.summary: Planned 2 BUILD tasks: (1) monkeylang.org listing PR, (2) JIT diagnostic output for fuzzer support.

queue.task: Submit monkeylang.org listing PR to mrnugget/monkeylang
queue.summary: Submitted PR #50 to mrnugget/monkeylang. Added JS implementation with 5 backends (interpreter, VM, JIT, transpiler, WASM), playground link, blog links.

queue.task: Add JIT diagnostic --trace-info flag for fuzzer support (Daniel collab)
queue.summary: Added --trace-info (JSON JIT diagnostics to stderr) and --diff-test (run JIT vs interpreter, compare outputs, exit 1 on mismatch) flags. Both designed for fuzzer integration. Tested with loop and fib programs.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, check email/GitHub
queue.summary: Git pushed workspace+henrydb. Neural-net CI still failing on GitHub (3 recent failures). No real email/notifications beyond CI. Added neural-net CI to queue priority.

queue.task: Mid-day review — what's working, what to tackle afternoon?
queue.summary: Mid-morning: 9 tasks done. Depth check passes (frozen txId bug was surprising). Neural-net CI still failing — urgent. Reprioritize: fix CI before T10-T14.

queue.goal: HenryDB depth: histogram accuracy or new persistence stress tests
queue.summary: Planned 2 BUILD tasks: (1) Persistence stress test for close/reopen cycle across all features, (2) Fix bugs found.

queue.task: Persistence stress test: close/reopen cycle for every feature (indexes, prepared stmts, cache stats, version maps, MVCC state)
queue.summary: FOUND & FIXED 2 BUGS: (1) Indexes empty after reopen — added rebuild from heap data during recovery. (2) PK uniqueness not enforced on INSERT — added BTree unique check before index insert. 15/15 persistence stress tests.

queue.task: Fix any persistence bugs found in stress test
queue.summary: Already fixed in T11 — both persistence bugs resolved.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, dashboard, knowledge capture
queue.summary: Git pushed henrydb+workspace. Knowledge capture: 2 new persistence bug patterns in failures.md.

queue.task: Research: deep-dive on something curiosity-driven (compiler, DB, or consciousness)
queue.summary: Explored concurrent session stress testing: 10 tests covering snapshot isolation, read-committed, 10 concurrent inserters, bank transfer consistency, persistence. All pass. MVCC is solid.

queue.task: Research: study grammar-based fuzzers (lafleur or similar) for Daniel collab
queue.summary: Built grammar-based differential fuzzer for Monkey JIT. 500/500 programs pass (JIT vs interpreter). Covers let, fn, if/else, arrays, arithmetic, closures. Committed and pushed.

queue.task: HenryDB: What areas have the least test coverage? Identify the next high-value testing target.
queue.summary: db.js (3201 LOC) has 0 direct test files (tested indirectly). volcano-planner (391 LOC) has 0 tests. High-value target: run SQL features through TransactionalDatabase to catch MVCC+SQL interaction bugs.
Planned 3 BUILD tasks: SQL-through-MVCC tests for JOINs/subqueries/CTEs, window functions/UNION through sessions, fix bugs found.

queue.task: Write SQL-through-MVCC test suite: JOINs, subqueries, CTEs, aggregates, GROUP BY through TransactionalDatabase
queue.summary: 18/18 SQL-through-MVCC tests pass: JOINs (4), subqueries (4), CTEs (3), aggregates (3), MVCC interactions (4). No bugs found — MVCC layer cleanly supports advanced SQL.

queue.task: Write MVCC+session SQL test: window functions, HAVING, UNION through sessions with concurrent readers
queue.summary: 12/12 MVCC+session SQL tests pass: window functions (3), UNION (3), ORDER BY LIMIT (2), concurrent readers (4). Found ORDER BY window-alias bug (sorts alphabetically not numerically) — tracked.

queue.task: Fix any bugs found in SQL-through-MVCC tests
queue.summary: No SQL-through-MVCC bugs to fix — all 30 tests pass. ORDER BY window-alias tracked separately.

queue.task: Investigate ORDER BY window-alias bug: RANK() column sorts alphabetically instead of numerically
queue.summary: FIXED: ORDER BY window-function alias bug. Window aliases werent in aliasExprs map, so ORDER BY fell through to _resolveColumn which couldnt find __window_ prefixed values. Added windowAliases set. All window/MVCC tests pass.

queue.goal: HenryDB: Stress test savepoints, prepared statements, and EXPLAIN ANALYZE through MVCC
queue.summary: Planned 3 BUILD tasks: savepoints, prepared stmts, EXPLAIN ANALYZE through MVCC.

queue.task: Savepoints through TransactionalDatabase: nested savepoints, rollback to savepoint, release, concurrent sessions
queue.summary: MAJOR FEATURE: Implemented SAVEPOINT/ROLLBACK TO/RELEASE SAVEPOINT in TransactionalDatabase sessions. 11/11 tests pass. Deep-copy version maps to avoid reference aliasing bug. xmax=-2 for permanently dead rows. Nested savepoints, concurrent sessions, DELETE/UPDATE rollback all work.

queue.task: Prepared statements through MVCC: prepare/execute with params, concurrent readers, persistence
queue.summary: 9/9 prepared statement MVCC tests pass. Covers SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE with params, session transactions, snapshot isolation, savepoint rollback, persistence, concurrent readers. No new bugs found.

queue.task: EXPLAIN ANALYZE through MVCC: verify plan output, cost estimates, actual row counts
queue.summary: 6/6 EXPLAIN MVCC tests pass. EXPLAIN/EXPLAIN ANALYZE work correctly through TransactionalDatabase with session visibility and accurate row counts.
